name: ambient-blockchain
description: Ambient adapter for safe Ambient Blockchain observation, Tool Oracle/x402 planning, program workbench readiness, and local live-test evidence.

env.name: AMBIENT_BLOCKCHAIN_RPC_URL
env.description: Optional Ambient RPC override. Defaults to https://rpc.ambient.xyz.

env.name: AMBIENT_BLOCKCHAIN_WS_URL
env.description: Optional Ambient websocket override for future oracle/program observation lanes.

env.name: AMBIENT_BLOCKCHAIN_KEYPAIR_FILE
env.description: Optional local signer keypair file. The current bundled commands only report whether it is configured; funded execution remains approval-gated.

env.name: AMBIENT_X402_KEYPAIR_FILE
env.description: Optional x402 signer keypair file for approved payment lanes. Never expose key material in chat or artifacts.

env.name: AMBIENT_BLOCKCHAIN_MAX_LAMPORTS
env.description: Optional per-operation lamport cap used by planning and future funded lanes.

env.name: AMBIENT_X402_MAX_MICRO_USDC
env.description: Optional x402 payment cap in micro-USDC used by quote planning and approved paid request execution.

env.name: AMBIENT_X402_PAYMENT_HEADER_FILE
env.description: Optional workspace-local file containing a one-use x402 payment header for approved paid request execution. The header value is never printed or written to artifacts.

ambient_chain_doctor.description: Report deterministic package readiness, pinned Ambient contracts, configured env booleans, and optional live read-only RPC reachability.

ambient_chain_rpc.description: Call an allowlisted read-only Solana-compatible Ambient JSON-RPC method and materialize the full response as evidence.

ambient_chain_account.description: Fetch balance and account metadata for an Ambient address through read-only RPC, with full response artifacting.

ambient_chain_transaction.description: Fetch a transaction by signature with log summary, or list recent signatures for an address, through read-only RPC.

ambient_chain_program_observe.description: Observe program accounts through read-only getProgramAccounts with bounded data slices, filters, summaries, and full artifacts.

ambient_keypair_status.description: Validate configured chain/x402 keypair bindings without printing paths, private key bytes, or secret values.

ambient_approval_verify.description: Verify a plan artifact approval digest, caps, and optional signer binding before any submit/payment/deploy/upgrade/authority command may run.

ambient_auction_inspect.description: Inspect pinned Auction/Tool Oracle contract metadata and optionally verify one account owner through read-only RPC.

ambient_oracle_request_plan.description: Create a non-mutating funded Tool Oracle request plan with caps, prompt hash, signer requirements, and evidence artifact.

ambient_oracle_request_submit.description: Submit an approved Tool Oracle request through an explicit oracle client command template, with cap replay, signer binding checks, and redacted evidence.

ambient_oracle_request_wait.description: Poll a Tool Oracle request account through read-only RPC, preserving each observation and decoded terminal-state evidence.

ambient_oracle_response_decode.description: Decode preserved Tool Oracle account data from a wait/account artifact or base64 payload into bounded response evidence.

ambient_oracle_reclaim_plan.description: Create a non-mutating cleanup plan for reclaiming lamports from a completed or failed Tool Oracle request account.

ambient_oracle_reclaim_execute.description: Execute an approved Tool Oracle reclaim through an explicit oracle client command template, with signer binding and redacted cleanup evidence.

ambient_x402_quote.description: Prepare or optionally probe an x402 quote request without submitting payment; funded x402 execution remains separately gated.

ambient_x402_request_execute.description: Execute an approved x402 paid HTTP request using a one-use payment header file, with cap replay, signer binding checks, receipt capture, and secret redaction.

ambient_program_doctor.description: Check local Solana/Anchor/Rust program toolchain readiness without installing dependencies or deploying anything.

ambient_program_scaffold.description: Scaffold a local Ambient program workbench project from native Rust, Anchor, Tool Oracle client, or Auction CPI templates.

ambient_program_build.description: Run cargo build for a local Ambient program project and preserve full stdout/stderr in an evidence artifact.

ambient_program_test.description: Run cargo test for a local Ambient program project and preserve full stdout/stderr in an evidence artifact.

ambient_program_deploy_plan.description: Hash a local program artifact and produce a non-mutating Ambient deployment plan with signer and lamport gates.

ambient_program_deploy_execute.description: Execute an approved Solana CLI program deploy after approval verification; writes full logs and redacted evidence.

ambient_program_upgrade_plan.description: Hash a local program artifact and produce a non-mutating upgrade plan for an existing Ambient program id.

ambient_program_upgrade_execute.description: Execute an approved Solana CLI program upgrade after approval verification, binary hash replay, and signer binding checks.

ambient_program_authority_plan.description: Produce a non-mutating upgrade-authority change plan for an Ambient program, including final authority removal plans.

ambient_program_authority_execute.description: Execute an approved Solana CLI program upgrade-authority change with approval, cap, and signer replay checks.

ambient_local_validator_gate.description: Check or opt-in run a bounded local solana-test-validator lifecycle with full logs, skip/setup evidence, and redacted ledger paths.

ambient_desktop_pi_dogfood.description: Run deterministic Desktop/Pi discovery dogfood against the bundled Ambient Blockchain package without network, secrets, signing, or spend.

ambient_blockchain_live_gate.description: Run the local Ambient Blockchain release gate, including optional Desktop/Pi dogfood, live read, Tool Oracle plan/funded lifecycle evidence, x402 quote/paid request evidence, program workbench lifecycle/deploy evidence, and local-validator lanes.
